# Third Party Notices

PrintEase Desktop uses SumatraPDF as the Windows PDF print helper.

Official website: https://www.sumatrapdfreader.org/

Official source: https://github.com/sumatrapdfreader/sumatrapdf

License: SumatraPDF is distributed under (A)GPLv3 with some BSD-licensed
code according to the official source repository. Verify the official
repository and release package for exact terms before public release.

PrintEase Desktop expects the unmodified portable executable at:

```txt
desktop-shell/vendor/win/SumatraPDF.exe
```

The executable is used only for local Windows PDF printing.
